tables.name: url-shortener
tables.comment:
URL shortening codes. PK only. Production billing: PROVISIONED (read=2, write=1).
Local/CI: PAY_PER_REQUEST. See ../entities.md for full attribute definitions.

columns.name: code
columns.comment: Partition key. URL-safe short code (random or generated). Used as the public path /r/{code}.

tables.name: url-shortener-stats
tables.comment:
Daily click stats per URL. PAY_PER_REQUEST. Composite key for time-series queries via begins_with on date.
See ../entities.md and ../access-patterns.md.

columns.name: code
columns.comment: Partition key. References url-shortener.code (no FK in DynamoDB).

columns.name: date
columns.comment: Sort key. ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. Query with begins_with for date range.
